zh.Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾阿波次 安
zh.lifeSummary: Ann於大約1565年出生在英國。她於1590年之前與Stephen Bachiler在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1624年3月2日之前在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾阿波次 安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ann于大约1565年出生在英国。她于1590年之前与Stephen Bachiler在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1624年3月2日之前在她的家乡，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Ann was born about 1565, in England. She married Stephen Bachiler before 1590, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 2 March 1624, in her hometown, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Ann est née environ 1565, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Stephen Bachiler avant 1590, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 2 mars 1624, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England: Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Ann wurde um 1565 in England geboren. Sie hat vor 1590 in England Stephen Bachiler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 2. März 1624 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England: Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Ann è nata il circa 1565 nel England. Lei sposato Stephen Bachiler prima del 1590, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 2 marzo 1624, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアアボッツ アン
ja.Wherwell, Hampshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアウアーウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Annは約1565年にイギリスで生まれた。1590年以前にイギリスでStephen Bachilerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1624年3月2日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann(은)는 대략 1565년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1590년 이전 영국에서 Stephen Bachiler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1624년 3월 2일 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ann nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Stephen Bachiler antes 1590, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 2 de março de 1624, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ro.Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, England: Abbotts Ann, Hampshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Ann родилась около 1565 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephen Bachiler перед 1590 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 2 марта 1624 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности Англия.
